creator: EcoGenesis Evidence Atlas
dataset_metadata.description: Deterministic 100-sequence competition validation batch covering species-safe, ambiguous, weak and metadata-blocked outcomes.
dataset_metadata.title: EcoGenesis Atlas competition UX 100-sequence validation run

method_or_sop: GBIF Sequence ID-compatible BLAST workflow with deterministic rank gates
project_title: EcoGenesis Atlas competition UX run: 100 barcode sequences
